value.found_quote:
### Protected paths in writable roots

In the default `workspace-write` sandbox policy, writable roots still include protected paths:
value.rationale: The page contains a dedicated section titled "Protected paths in writable roots" describing how, in the default workspace-write sandbox policy, certain paths (like /.git, /.agents, /.codex) remain read-only. This directly substantiates the claim as a current feature.
